message:
fix(tls,web): detect dead TCP under TLS and prevent session ID collisions

Two cross-module integration hardening fixes:

1. tls.c: asx_tls_stream_poll_read/write now check if the underlying
   TCP stream is alive before delegating I/O. If the TCP stream was
   closed externally (e.g., by server_stop), the TLS stream transitions
   to ERROR state and returns ASX_E_DISCONNECTED instead of passing a
   dead handle to the TCP layer.

2. web.c: asx_web_session_create now detects ID collisions when the
   uint32_t sequence counter wraps (~4B sessions). If a generated ID
   matches an existing active session, the sequence is bumped and the
   ID is regenerated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
